title: How to 10x Your Claude Code Projects (Karpathy's Method)
summary: Austin Marchese presents three productivity strategies inspired by Andrej Karpathy for improving Claude Code project output: LLM Knowledge Bases, Auto-Research, and Context Engineering. The video positions these as methods for dramatically accelerating software development with Claude.
